mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no statistical relationship with FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 6.0 percent, labor market deterioration signals impending corporate earnings contraction, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in more than 55 percent of instances where UNRATE exceeds 6.0 percent across multiple cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real sales of automobiles and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer demand recovery, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 20-day SPX returns with out-of-sample accuracy above 50 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indexes reflect strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week exclusively during economic expansion phases.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases fail to predict positive 5-day SPX returns during expansion periods, or the signal reverses direction during contractions.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls directly boost aggregate consumer spending capacity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive PAYEMS revisions consistently coincide with negative 20-day SPX returns across multiple market cycles without exception.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation above a 0.4 percent monthly threshold forces anticipatory monetary tightening expectations, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL spikes above the threshold consistently precede positive 60-day SPX returns without subsequent drawdowns or valuation compression.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent quarterly growth in real GDP and monthly industrial production confirms broad-based economic momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Divergence between GDPC1 and INDPRO trends eliminates predictive power, or joint growth fails to yield positive 60-day returns in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp monthly contractions in real automobile sales signal immediate consumer distress and reduced corporate revenue expectations, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week during liquidity-constrained environments.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines greater than 5 percent month-over-month
failure_condition: RSAFS declines of this magnitude fail to predict negative 5-day SPX returns, or the signal remains positive during documented credit stress periods.
